response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements. Their background is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems with no evidence of financial systems development.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse tech stacks
Proven track record in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No evidence of C++ development on Windows or in capital markets environments
Lacks required domain knowledge in fixed income or investment banking systems
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle exposure
